channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: DOH assures stable medicine prices amid oil crisis until June 2026
item.description: The Department of Health (DOH) has announced that there will be no increase in the prices of medicines until June 2026, giving temporary relief to Filipinos coping with rising costs of living. Health ...

item.title: Three Men Sentenced After Violent Assault on Off-Duty Police in Newtown
item.description: Three men, Danai Deneiderhavsein (19), Finley Goodwin (23), and Koby Weaver (22), have been sentenced following a violent assault on two off-duty police officers in Newtown, Sydney, on the night of 22...

item.title: Government boosts youth employment through skills development and major projects
item.description: Dodoma – The government of Tanzania dey work hard to make sure youth get the right skills through the National Skills Development Programme. Dis programme go help dem find jobs and take part properly ...

item.title: Liverpool Hosts Fulham in Premier League Clash Amid Struggles and Injuries
item.description: Liverpool faces Fulham at Anfield in a crucial Premier League match as the Reds seek to end a three-game winless streak. Currently five points behind the top four, Liverpool is fighting to secure a Ch...

item.title: Westpac updates inflation forecast as conflict in Iran drives price hikes
item.description: Westpac has revised its inflation forecast, predicting a surge to 4.2% in March, the first full month of the US-led war on Iran. The bank's economists have warned that the conflict could cause inflati...

item.title: UDA and ODM dispute on electoral zones unsettles Kenya Kwanza coalition
item.description: The ongoing disagreement between UDA and ODM over electoral zoning is causing significant uncertainty within the Kenya Kwanza coalition ahead of the 2027 General Election. The core issue is which part...

item.title: Canadian Art Exhibitions Exploring Identity, Creativity, and Culture
item.description: A series of remarkable art exhibitions across Canada are offering visitors new ways to engage with identity, beauty, and creativity. At the Art Gallery of Hamilton (AGH), Shary Boyle’s White Elephant,...

item.title: Philippine Navy Condemns Chinese Flare Use Against Patrol Plane Over West Philippine Sea
item.description: The Philippine Navy has strongly condemned the Chinese military’s reported use of flares against a Philippine Coast Guard (PCG) aircraft conducting a lawful patrol above the West Philippine Sea (WPS)....

item.title: ICC has not ordered Duterte’s release or Marcos’ detention, contrary to false online claims
item.description: Rappler debunks a viral Facebook post falsely claiming that the International Criminal Court (ICC) has released former president Rodrigo Duterte and issued an imprisonment order against President Ferd...

item.title: Economists warn rising oil prices may increase housing construction costs amid Middle East conflict
item.description: Amid ongoing economic fallout from the war in Iran, Australian economists are predicting a rise in the cost of building new suburban homes, while industry groups argue the impact will be modest. Westp...

item.title: Australian Police Security for Harry and Meghan’s Visit to Be Funded by Taxpayers
item.description: Prince Harry and Meghan Markle are set to visit Melbourne and Sydney next week for a privately funded tour featuring business and philanthropic events, but Australian taxpayers will bear the cost of p...

item.title: Trump Questions Iran War Ceasefire as Tensions Over Strait of Hormuz and Lebanon Escalate
item.description: The fragile ceasefire between the US and Iran is under further strain as President Donald Trump accuses Tehran of breaching the terms of the agreement, particularly concerning the closure of the Strai...

item.title: Climate Tool Matches Voters with Candidates Based on Policy Preferences
item.description: Build a Ballot, an online voting tool launched by Lizzie Hedding through her climate organisation Project Planet, has gained significant traction ahead of the 2026 Australian federal election. The too...

item.title: Building a stronger future for Tanzanian football after AFCON lessons
item.description: The article reflects on Tanzania’s participation in the Africa Cup of Nations (AFCON) as a major moment that should inspire long-term development in local football. It acknowledges that while Taifa St...

item.title: Empowering Pastoralist Girls: Mesha Singolyo’s Journey of Change in Tanzania
item.description: In Monduli District, Arusha, Mesha Pius Singolyo is making remarkable progress in uplifting girls and women from pastoralist communities. As Director of Partnership for Women Development (PWD) Tanzani...

item.title: Immigration Service Investigates Seme Border Extortion Claims, Suspends Officers
item.description: The Nigeria Immigration Service (NIS) has launched an investigation into claims of extortion by personnel operating along the Lagos-Seme border. In response to reports circulating online, the Comptrol...

item.title: Why Zach Wilson's Mother Frequently Appears in the News
item.description: Zach Wilson’s mother, Lisa Wilson, has become a frequent subject of online discussion and trending topics, largely due to her active presence on social media and her unwavering support – and sometimes...

item.title: Restoring Shipping Confidence in the Strait of Hormuz Amid Regional Tensions
item.description: Following announcements of a ceasefire by President Donald Trump, there was initial optimism that shipping through the Strait of Hormuz would resume quickly. However, despite these declarations, comme...

item.title: ADC Seeks Court Order To Restore Mark, Aregbesola as Party Officials
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) don carry matter go Federal High Court for Abuja, ask make court order Independent National Electoral Commission (INEC) to restore the names of Senator David Mark...

item.title: Arena Sports Show Discusses Tight Battle for Footballer of the Season as Pirates and Sundowns Vie for League Glory
item.description: In the 99th episode of the Arena Sports Show, host Clauiee Grace Mpanza is joined by regular guests Mahlatse Mphahlele and Sizwe Mabena, along with football analyst Teboho Molopa, for an in-depth disc...
